class.name: HEGoInputReceiverNode
class.brief_description: Base node type that can receive node inputs.
class.description:
Provides a helper for connecting another HEGo node into a specific input index on the current node.
Use this as the base for nodes that accept upstream Houdini connections.

method.name: connect_input
method.description:
Submits a task to connect [code]other_node[/code] into this node's [code]input_index[/code].
Both nodes should already be instantiated. If either node id is invalid, downstream HAPI calls can fail and log errors.
The connection is cached internally. If the same source node is already connected at the same index the call returns a no-op task unless [code]force[/code] is [code]true[/code].
